alteration_package_application_id.description: Must be a UUID. Unique identifier of the application alteration package.

organization_id.description: Must be a UUID. Unique identifier of the organization.

created_at.description: The date/time at which the application alteration package was created.

created_by.description: `null` is allowed. An object indicating the user or API key that created the application alteration package. See [Authentication](#client-apps).

module.description: Custom module-specific fields stored against the application alteration package. See [product modules](doc:product-modules-overview) for more details.

monthly_premium.description: Null is allowed. The monthly premium amount in cents.

currency.description: Null is allowed. The currency code for premium values.

sum_assured.description: Null is allowed. The sum assured amount in cents.

billing_frequency.description: Null is allowed. The billing frequency to be applied.

status.description: Null is allowed. The status of the application alteration package.

change_description.description: Null is allowed. Description of the change being applied.

input_data.description: The input data received when creating the alteration package.

application_id.description: Must be a UUID. Unique identifier of the related application.

alteration_hook_key.description: The identifier of the alteration hook used to create this package.

example.change_description: Updating cover amount before issuing policy
